metadata.spoken_words: Our new product launches this Friday,
metadata.notes: Mouth barely articulates while full sentence plays — audio reads as TTS over near-still lips.

metadata.spoken_words: and we could not be more excited about it.
metadata.notes: Lip motion resumes but trails the phonemes by roughly 300ms.
